descriptions.audio_input: Talk now. If the meter lights up, your microphone is working.
descriptions.audio_input_error: We are unable to detect your available microphones. This is likely due to a privacy setting in your browser. If the meter lights up, your microphone is working. If not, click on the camera icon in your browser address bar, enable access to camera and mic, and refresh your browser.
descriptions.audio_input_help: Check that your volume input is turned all the way up. You can check this in your computer settings or device settings. You will see a visual indicator on the previous page when you speak into the microphone.
descriptions.audio_output: If you can hear the test sound, your speakers are working.
descriptions.audio_output_error: We are unable to detect your available speakers. This is likely due to a privacy setting in your browser. However, if you can hear the test sound, your speakers are still working.
descriptions.audio_output_help: Check that your speaker volume is turned all the way up. You can check this in your computer settings or device settings. You can test the sound by clicking the “play test sound” button on the previous page.
descriptions.audio_output_test: The test sound is playing. If you cannot hear it, check that your speaker volume is turned up.
descriptions.cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel the visit?
descriptions.schedule: Schedule a televisit with the participant.
descriptions.video: If you can see yourself, your camera is active.
descriptions.video_help: If you cannot see your camera working, you may need to allow access. In your browsers address bar, click the camera blocked icon and allow access. You may need to refresh your browser afterward. On tablet or mobile devices, you will need to allow access in your device settings or via the dialog that appears when you open the video call link.
descriptions.waiting: It’s time for your televisit. Please join the waiting room and we’ll be right with you.
